verses.text: 'If it had not been the LORD who was on our side,' the psalmist says, the enemies would have swallowed them alive. He traces survival to God. Without the LORD, His people would long ago have been overwhelmed.

'If it had not been the LORD who was on our side,' the psalmist says, the enemies would have swallowed them alive. He traces survival to God. Without the LORD, His people would long ago have been overwhelmed.

'If it had not been the LORD who was on our side,' the psalmist says, the enemies would have swallowed them alive. He traces survival to God. Without the LORD, His people would long ago have been overwhelmed.
The floods and proud waters would have gone over their soul. The danger was deadly. They were as near to ruin as a drowning man before God intervened.
The floods and proud waters would have gone over their soul. The danger was deadly. They were as near to ruin as a drowning man before God intervened.

'Blessed be the LORD,' for their soul escaped 'as a bird out of the snare of the fowlers'; 'our help is in the name of the LORD.' Rescue calls for praise. The God who made heaven and earth is the help of His endangered people.
